arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Drops Major Transfer Update on Tottenham’s €65M-Rated Star Amid PSG, Real Madrid Interest
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur center-back Cristian Romero has been the subject of transfer rumors in recent days. Paris Saint-Germain was reportedly one of the clubs that showed interest this summer, but nothing has occurred. arts.ttl: Revealed: How Lionel Messi, Neymar Jr. Exits Have Impact PSG Off the Pitch
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have said goodbye to the superstar era. Over the past two years, the Parisians have seen Neymar Jr., Lionel Messi, and Kylian Mbappé, which has made the capital club lose its appeal. The Ligue 1 side have gone for young talent and players that can fit into Luis Enrique’s tactical puzzle. arts.ttl: Chelsea Ready to Offload £88M Flop to PSG’s Ligue 1 Rival, Report Says
arts.sum: The Ligue 1 race early into the 2024-25 season could be a three-horse race with Paris Saint-Germain currently in first place with 12 points. However, Olympique de Marseille and AS Monaco are right behind them, each with 10 points. Nonetheless, Marseille probably foresee a three-team race for the league title.
